test_name: RM grants consent for lead_contact purpose — happy path
preconditions: Lead LD-2026-00042 exists in org ORG-001 with owner_id = RM-USER-001
No prior consent_records row for (lead_id, purpose='lead_contact')
RM-USER-001 has role RM with consent_ledger capability scope O
test_steps: Query SELECT * FROM consent_records WHERE lead_id='LD-2026-00042' AND purpose='lead_contact'
Query SELECT consent_status FROM leads WHERE lead_id='LD-2026-00042'
Query SELECT * FROM audit_logs WHERE detail->>'entity_id' = '<consent_id>' AND action='CONSENT_CAPTURED'
expected_result: HTTP 201; response data.consent_id is a non-null UUID; consent_records row has state='granted', actor='rm', superseded_by=NULL; leads.consent_status re-derived (at minimum 'partial'); audit_logs row exists with action='CONSENT_CAPTURED', entity='consent_records', no PII in detail; error=null
postconditions: consent_records count for (LD-2026-00042, lead_contact) = 1
leads.consent_status IN ('partial','captured') — never 'pending' after a granted row
event_outbox has NO CONSENT_WITHDRAWN event (granted state does not emit withdrawal)

test_name: RM withdraws lead_contact consent — new append row, outbox event emitted
preconditions: Lead LD-2026-00042 exists in org ORG-001 owned by RM-USER-001
consent_records row exists: purpose='lead_contact', state='granted', created_at=now()-1h, superseded_by=NULL
RM-USER-001 JWT available
test_steps: Query SELECT state, superseded_by FROM consent_records WHERE lead_id='LD-2026-00042' AND purpose='lead_contact' ORDER BY created_at ASC
Query SELECT * FROM event_outbox WHERE event_code='CONSENT_WITHDRAWN' AND payload->>'lead_id'='LD-2026-00042'
Query SELECT consent_status FROM leads WHERE lead_id='LD-2026-00042'
expected_result: HTTP 201; two consent_records rows for (LD-2026-00042, lead_contact) — first remains state='granted' (not mutated), second has state='withdrawn'; event_outbox row with event_code='CONSENT_WITHDRAWN', payload.purpose='lead_contact', payload.lead_id='LD-2026-00042', no raw PII in payload; leads.consent_status='withdrawn'
postconditions: Original granted row is unchanged (append-only invariant INV-01)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM consent_records WHERE lead_id='LD-2026-00042' AND purpose='lead_contact' = 2
INV-05: withdrawn row has a prior granted row for same (lead_id, purpose)

test_name: Second grant for same purpose supersedes prior granted row
preconditions: Lead LD-2026-00042 exists; consent_records row CSN-001 exists: purpose='kyc', state='granted', superseded_by=NULL
test_steps: Assert HTTP 201; capture new consent_id CSN-002
Query SELECT superseded_by FROM consent_records WHERE consent_id='CSN-001'
Query SELECT superseded_by FROM consent_records WHERE consent_id='CSN-002'
expected_result: HTTP 201; CSN-001.superseded_by = CSN-002; CSN-002.superseded_by = NULL; INV-03 and INV-04 pass (superseded_by references same lead and same purpose)
postconditions: INV-03: no superseded_by cross-lead
INV-04: superseded_by across same purpose only

test_name: Attempt to withdraw consent never granted — VALIDATION_ERROR
preconditions: Lead LD-2026-00042 exists; NO consent_records row for purpose='los_handoff'
test_steps: Assert error.code='VALIDATION_ERROR' and error.message contains 'Cannot withdraw consent that was never granted'
Verify no consent_records row inserted for (LD-2026-00042, los_handoff)
expected_result: HTTP 400; error.code='VALIDATION_ERROR'; error.message contains 'Cannot withdraw consent that was never granted'; no new row in consent_records; leads.consent_status unchanged
postconditions: consent_records count for (LD-2026-00042, los_handoff) remains 0

test_name: Attempt direct UPDATE on consent_records — blocked by append-only enforcement
preconditions: consent_records row CSN-001 exists with state='granted'
test_steps: Attempt UPDATE consent_records SET state='withdrawn' WHERE consent_id='CSN-001' using application DB role
Assert DB operation is rejected (REVOKE enforced at DB layer)
Query SELECT state FROM consent_records WHERE consent_id='CSN-001'

test_data.attempted_sql: UPDATE consent_records SET state='withdrawn' WHERE consent_id='CSN-001'

expected_result: DB operation fails; state remains 'granted'; consent_records row is not mutated
postconditions: INV-01: no consent_records row has updated_at != created_at (for system-managed states)

di_meta.setup_sql: INSERT INTO consent_records (consent_id, lead_id, org_id, purpose, state, notice_version, consent_text_version, actor, created_at) VALUES ('CSN-DI-001', 'LD-2026-00042', 'ORG-001', 'lead_contact', 'granted', 'v1.0', 'v1.0', 'rm', NOW())
di_meta.action: UPDATE consent_records SET state='withdrawn' WHERE consent_id='CSN-DI-001'
di_meta.invariant_query: SELECT consent_id FROM consent_records WHERE consent_id='CSN-DI-001' AND state='withdrawn'

test_name: Consent withdrawal of los_handoff purpose blocks hand-off stage guard
preconditions: Lead LD-2026-00042 is in stage 'ready_for_handoff' with all guards previously passing
consent_records has granted row for purpose='los_handoff'
RM-USER-001 JWT available
test_steps: Assert HTTP 409 with error detail referencing consent guard failure
expected_result: Withdrawal returns 201; subsequent hand-off attempt returns 409 CONFLICT with detail.reason='STAGE_GUARD_FAILED' referencing los_handoff consent withdrawn; lead stage remains 'ready_for_handoff'
postconditions: leads.lead_stage = 'ready_for_handoff' (unchanged)
leads.consent_status = 'withdrawn'

test_name: GET /leads/{id}/consents — ip_device masked for RM, unmasked for DPO

RM-USER-001 has role RM; DPO-USER-001 has role DPO

expected_result: RM response: data[0].ip_device = null; DPO response: data[0].ip_device = {"ip":"192.168.1.1","ua":"Mozilla/5.0"}

test_steps: Query SELECT actor, channel, ip_device FROM consent_records WHERE lead_id='LD-2026-00042' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
RM calls GET /api/v1/leads/LD-2026-00042/consents; assert new row visible
expected_result: HTTP 201; consent_records row actor='customer', channel derived from customer_links.channel, ip_device populated from request headers; leads.consent_status re-derived; row appears in RM's Lead 360 consent history
postconditions: consent_records row is append-only; actor='customer' is persisted correctly

test_name: Consent history pagination — 30 records, default page returns 25
preconditions: Lead LD-2026-00042 has exactly 30 consent_records rows (mixed purposes, states) all inserted 2s apart
test_steps: Assert HTTP 200; assert data.length = 25; meta.pagination.total = 30; meta.pagination.page = 1
expected_result: Page 1: 25 records ordered by created_at ASC; page 2: remaining 5 records; meta.pagination reflects server-side pagination; no data leak from other leads

test_name: RM records granted consent from Lead 360 — UI updates StatusChip
preconditions: RM-USER-001 is authenticated in browser session
Lead LD-2026-00042 has no prior consent_records
test_steps: In drawer: select purpose='lead_contact', state='granted', fill notice_version='v1.0', consent_text_version='v1.0'
Assert Consent history DataTable shows new row
expected_result: Toast 'Consent recorded' appears; new row with state='granted' and green StatusChip appears in consent history DataTable; Lead 360 consent_status chip updates from 'pending' to at least 'partial'

test_name: consent_records has no orphaned superseded_by foreign key
preconditions: At least 2 consent_records rows for same (lead_id, purpose) where second supersedes first
test_steps: Run INV-03 query: SELECT cr1.consent_id FROM consent_records cr1 INNER JOIN consent_records cr2 ON cr2.consent_id=cr1.superseded_by WHERE cr1.lead_id<>cr2.lead_id OR cr1.org_id<>cr2.org_id
Run INV-04 query: SELECT cr1.consent_id FROM consent_records cr1 INNER JOIN consent_records cr2 ON cr2.consent_id=cr1.superseded_by WHERE cr1.purpose<>cr2.purpose

test_data.setup_description: Seed two consent_records: CSN-A (purpose='kyc', state='granted') then CSN-B (purpose='kyc', state='granted', superseded_by=CSN-A's id would be reversed — CSN-A.superseded_by=CSN-B)

expected_result: Both invariant queries return 0 rows; superseded_by is always within same lead, org, and same purpose

di_meta.setup_sql: INSERT INTO consent_records VALUES ('CSN-DI-A','LD-2026-00042','ORG-001','kyc','granted','v1.0','v1.0',NULL,'rm',NULL,NULL,NULL,NOW()); INSERT INTO consent_records VALUES ('CSN-DI-B','LD-2026-00042','ORG-001','kyc','granted','v1.1','v1.1','CSN-DI-A','rm',NULL,NULL,NULL,NOW())
di_meta.action: Run INV-03 and INV-04 invariant queries
di_meta.invariant_query: SELECT cr1.consent_id FROM consent_records cr1 INNER JOIN consent_records cr2 ON cr2.consent_id=cr1.superseded_by WHERE cr1.lead_id<>cr2.lead_id OR cr1.org_id<>cr2.org_id OR cr1.purpose<>cr2.purpose
di_meta.cleanup: DELETE FROM consent_records WHERE consent_id IN ('CSN-DI-A','CSN-DI-B')

test_name: DPO creates erasure request for customer — happy path with outbox event
preconditions: customer_profiles row exists with customer_profile_id='CPR-001' in ORG-001
DPO-USER-001 JWT available; no active legal_hold in retention_policies
test_steps: POST /api/v1/data-rights with headers Idempotency-Key: IDM-DR-001 and body { "customer_profile_id": "CPR-001", "request_type": "erasure" }
Assert data.status = 'open'; data.due_at is a future timestamp
Query event_outbox WHERE event_code='DATA_RIGHT_REQUEST' AND aggregate_id=<new_id>
expected_result: HTTP 201; data.data_rights_request_id is UUID; data.status='open'; data.request_type='erasure'; data.due_at > NOW(); event_outbox row with event_code='DATA_RIGHT_REQUEST', aggregate_type='DataRightsRequest', status='pending'; audit_logs row with entity_type='DataRightsRequest', no PII logged
postconditions: data_rights_requests.status = 'open'
INV-01: customer_profile_id references valid customer_profiles row

test_name: Erasure blocked when active legal hold exists — CONFLICT with LEGAL_HOLD
preconditions: data_rights_requests row DRR-001 exists with request_type='erasure', status='in_review'
retention_policies row exists with legal_hold=true, is_active=true for ORG-001
test_steps: Query data_rights_requests WHERE data_rights_request_id='DRR-001'; assert status still 'in_review'
expected_result: HTTP 409; error.code='CONFLICT'; error.detail.reason='LEGAL_HOLD'; data_rights_requests row status remains 'in_review' (not updated to 'fulfilled'); no DATA_RIGHT_ERASURE_APPROVED event emitted
postconditions: INV-05 (FR-115): no lead anonymised while legal hold active

test_name: Full data-rights workflow: open → in_review → fulfilled (non-erasure)
preconditions: data_rights_requests row DRR-002 exists with request_type='access', status='open'
DPO-USER-001 JWT available
test_steps: PATCH /api/v1/data-rights/DRR-002 with { "status": "fulfilled", "disposition": "Access copy provided via secure email" } → assert 200, data.status='fulfilled'
Query audit_logs for DRR-002: expect 2 rows (create + each update)

transitions.disposition: Access copy provided via secure email

expected_result: Both PATCHes return 200; final status='fulfilled'; audit_logs has entries for both transitions; data.disposition='Access copy provided via secure email'; INV-02: fulfilled row has non-null disposition
postconditions: INV-02: SELECT data_rights_request_id FROM data_rights_requests WHERE status IN ('fulfilled','rejected_retained') AND (disposition IS NULL OR disposition='') returns 0 rows

test_name: Erasure approved (no legal hold) — FR-115 triggered via outbox

No retention_policies row with legal_hold=true and is_active=true
DPO-USER-001 JWT available
test_steps: PATCH /api/v1/data-rights/DRR-003 with { "status": "fulfilled", "disposition": "Customer erasure verified; no outstanding regulatory hold" }
Query event_outbox WHERE aggregate_id='DRR-003' AND event_code='DATA_RIGHT_REQUEST'
Assert outbox row status='pending' (signals FR-115 RetentionEngine)

payload.disposition: Customer erasure verified; no outstanding regulatory hold

expected_result: HTTP 200; status='fulfilled'; event_outbox row with event_code='DATA_RIGHT_REQUEST', aggregate_type='DataRightsRequest', aggregate_id='DRR-003', status='pending' emitted in same transaction (signals erasure to FR-115)
postconditions: INV-04 (FR-112): fulfilled erasure request has DATA_RIGHT_REQUEST outbox entry

expected_result: HTTP 409; error.code='CONFLICT'; no state change; fulfilled is a terminal state

expected_result: GRV-010 and GRV-011 updated to status='escalated'; GRV-012 (resolved) NOT touched — only open/in_progress escalated; GRV-013 (closed, terminal) NOT touched; 2 audit_logs entries appended; escalation notifications dispatched post-commit

RM-USER-002 is a different RM in the same org
expected_result: HTTP 403; error.code='FORBIDDEN'; GRV-005.status unchanged; DPO (scope A) can still PATCH this grievance

test_name: Idempotency replay of grievance creation returns original without duplicate
preconditions: First POST with Idempotency-Key='GRV-IDM-DUP-001' already created grievance GRV-ORIG-001
test_steps: POST /api/v1/grievances again with same Idempotency-Key='GRV-IDM-DUP-001' and same body
Query SELECT COUNT(*) FROM grievances WHERE idempotency_key='GRV-IDM-DUP-001'; assert count=1
expected_result: HTTP 200; data.grievance_id = original GRV-ORIG-001; grievances count for this idempotency_key = 1; no second row created; IDEMPOTENT_REPLAY indicated
postconditions: INV-1: grievance_no uniqueness maintained (no duplicate from replay)

test_name: No grievance in closed status with blank closure_proof_ref
preconditions: grievances table has at least one row in 'closed' status from the workflow test
test_steps: Run INV-2: SELECT grievance_id FROM grievances WHERE status='closed' AND (closure_proof_ref IS NULL OR closure_proof_ref='')
Run INV-3: SELECT grievance_id FROM grievances WHERE status IN ('resolved','closed') AND (response IS NULL OR response='')
Run INV-5: SELECT grievance_id FROM grievances WHERE status IN ('in_progress','escalated','resolved','closed') AND owner_id IS NULL
expected_result: All three invariant queries return 0 rows

di_meta.setup_sql: -- Use rows from grievance lifecycle tests
di_meta.invariant_query: SELECT grievance_id FROM grievances WHERE status='closed' AND (closure_proof_ref IS NULL OR closure_proof_ref='') UNION ALL SELECT grievance_id FROM grievances WHERE status IN ('resolved','closed') AND (response IS NULL OR response='') UNION ALL SELECT grievance_id FROM grievances WHERE status IN ('in_progress','escalated','resolved','closed') AND owner_id IS NULL

test_name: EscalationBanner visible on overdue grievance in Compliance Console list
preconditions: DPO-USER-001 authenticated in browser
Grievance GRV-ESC-001 has sla_due_at = 1 hour ago, status='open'
test_steps: Assert EscalationBanner renders on or near that row
Assert sla_due_at displayed in IST format dd-MM-yyyy HH:mm with amber styling
expected_result: EscalationBanner component visible on overdue row; sla_due_at shown in IST ('17-06-2026 11:00'); banner has amber/warning colour styling

ui_meta.visual_assert: EscalationBanner background-color is amber (#f59e0b region); sla_due_at text matches dd-MM-yyyy HH:mm IST
ui_meta.a11y: EscalationBanner has role='alert'; row has sufficient colour contrast ratio >= 4.5:1

test_name: RetentionEngine dry-run counts eligible leads correctly, respects legal hold exclusion
preconditions: 5 leads exist with lead_identities.updated_at > 365 days ago and lead_stage='rejected' (eligible for identity/anonymise policy)
1 lead within the 365-day window (ineligible)
retention_policies row: data_category='identity', action='anonymise', retain_days=365, is_active=true, legal_hold=false
DPO-USER-001 JWT available
test_steps: Verify no lead_identities rows were mutated (SELECT name FROM lead_identities WHERE name='ANONYMISED' = 0 rows)
expected_result: HTTP 202; data.mode='dry_run'; data.preview.eligible_leads=5; data.preview.blocked_by_legal_hold=0; zero DB writes performed (dry-run invariant)
postconditions: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lead_identities WHERE name='ANONYMISED' = 0 (no writes in dry-run)

test_name: ADMIN triggers apply-run — eligible lead PII anonymised, audit logged, consent_records untouched
preconditions: Lead LD-ELIGIBLE-001 has lead_identities with name='John Doe', mobile='9876543210', pan_token='PAN123', dob='1985-05-15', aadhaar_ref_token='AADH-REF-001'
LD-ELIGIBLE-001 lead_stage='rejected', outcome_at > 365 days ago
retention_policies: data_category='identity', action='anonymise', retain_days=365, is_active=true, legal_hold=false
No open data_rights_requests or grievances for LD-ELIGIBLE-001
2 consent_records rows for LD-ELIGIBLE-001
ADMIN-USER-001 JWT available
test_steps: Assert HTTP 202; data.run_id is UUID; data.status='queued'
Query SELECT name, mobile, pan_token, dob, aadhaar_ref_token FROM lead_identities WHERE lead_id='LD-ELIGIBLE-001'
Query SELECT COUNT(*) FROM consent_records WHERE lead_id='LD-ELIGIBLE-001'
Query SELECT * FROM audit_logs WHERE lead_id='LD-ELIGIBLE-001' AND detail->>'action_taken' IN ('anonymise','purge')
expected_result: lead_identities row: name='ANONYMISED', mobile='0000000000', email=NULL, pan_token=NULL, dob=NULL, aadhaar_ref_token=NULL; consent_records count remains 2 (untouched, append-only); audit_logs has new row with detail.action_taken='anonymise' and lead_id='LD-ELIGIBLE-001'
postconditions: INV-01: no consent_records row modified
INV-04: if name='ANONYMISED' then pan_token IS NULL (no partial anonymisation)
INV-08: anonymised lead has corresponding audit_log entry

test_name: Apply-run skips lead with active legal hold — lead PII unchanged
preconditions: Lead LD-HOLD-001 is past retention cutoff and would otherwise be eligible
retention_policies row with legal_hold=true, is_active=true for data_category='identity'
ADMIN-USER-001 JWT available
test_steps: Query SELECT name FROM lead_identities WHERE lead_id='LD-HOLD-001'

Run INV-05: SELECT l.lead_id FROM leads l JOIN lead_identities li ON li.lead_identity_id=l.lead_identity_id WHERE li.name='ANONYMISED' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM retention_policies rp WHERE rp.legal_hold=true AND rp.is_active=true)
expected_result: lead_identities.name for LD-HOLD-001 remains unchanged (not 'ANONYMISED'); INV-05 returns 0 rows
postconditions: INV-05 returns 0 rows

test_name: Apply-run skips lead with open DataRightsRequest or open Grievance
preconditions: Lead LD-OPEN-DRR exists past retention cutoff; data_rights_requests row with lead_id='LD-OPEN-DRR', status='open'
Lead LD-OPEN-GRV exists past retention cutoff; grievances row with lead_id='LD-OPEN-GRV', status='in_progress'
Lead LD-ELIGIBLE-002 exists past retention cutoff; no open DRR or grievance
test_steps: Query lead_identities for LD-OPEN-DRR: assert name != 'ANONYMISED'
Query lead_identities for LD-OPEN-GRV: assert name != 'ANONYMISED'
Query lead_identities for LD-ELIGIBLE-002: assert name = 'ANONYMISED'
expected_result: LD-OPEN-DRR and LD-OPEN-GRV PII fields not anonymised; LD-ELIGIBLE-002 is anonymised; audit log has 1 entry (for LD-ELIGIBLE-002 only); INV-06 and INV-07 return 0 rows
postconditions: INV-06: SELECT l.lead_id FROM leads l JOIN lead_identities li ON li.lead_identity_id=l.lead_identity_id WHERE li.name='ANONYMISED' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM data_rights_requests drr WHERE drr.lead_id=l.lead_id AND drr.status IN ('open','in_review')) = 0 rows
INV-07: same check for open grievances = 0 rows

test_name: DPO can trigger dry-run but not apply-run — FORBIDDEN on apply
preconditions: DPO-USER-001 JWT available
expected_result: Dry-run returns 202; apply returns 403 FORBIDDEN; no retention job queued for apply attempt by DPO

test_name: ADMIN cannot create retention policy for consent data category — VALIDATION_ERROR
preconditions: ADMIN-USER-001 JWT available
expected_result: HTTP 400; error.code='VALIDATION_ERROR'; error.fields contains data_category; error.message references consent records exemption from purge; no retention_policies row inserted

test_name: Mid-batch DB failure rolls back only the failing lead's transaction; other leads committed
preconditions: 5 leads eligible for anonymisation
DB mock forces a constraint failure on the 3rd lead's batch write
test_steps: Trigger apply-run with mocked DB failure on 3rd lead
Assert leads 1 and 2 have name='ANONYMISED' in lead_identities (committed)
Assert lead 3 has original name (rolled back; no partial state)
Assert error logged for lead 3 with correlation_id
Run INV-04 for all processed leads: no partial anonymisation
expected_result: Leads at index 1, 2, 4, 5 fully anonymised; lead 3 is in original state; structured error logged with lead_id and correlation_id; INV-04 returns 0 rows across all leads
postconditions: INV-04: no partial anonymisation state exists for any of the 5 leads

test_name: Retention engine never modifies audit_logs or consent_records rows
preconditions: Lead LD-ELIGIBLE-003 eligible for kyc_doc/purge retention action
LD-ELIGIBLE-003 has 3 audit_logs rows and 2 consent_records rows pre-existing
test_steps: Record COUNT(*) FROM audit_logs WHERE lead_id='LD-ELIGIBLE-003' = 3
Record COUNT(*) FROM consent_records WHERE lead_id='LD-ELIGIBLE-003' = 2
After run: COUNT(*) FROM audit_logs WHERE lead_id='LD-ELIGIBLE-003' >= 4 (3 pre-existing + new retention audit row)
Assert: SELECT audit_id FROM audit_logs WHERE lead_id='LD-ELIGIBLE-003' AND updated_at != created_at = 0 rows
Assert: COUNT(*) FROM consent_records WHERE lead_id='LD-ELIGIBLE-003' = 2 (unchanged)
expected_result: audit_logs count >= 4 after run (new retention entry added, pre-existing NOT modified); consent_records count remains exactly 2 (append-only, untouched by retention); INV-01 and INV-02 pass

di_meta.setup_sql: -- Seed lead with pre-existing audit and consent rows; record counts before run
di_meta.action: Trigger apply-run via POST /api/v1/admin/retention/run {mode:'apply'}; then SELECT audit_id FROM audit_logs WHERE lead_id='LD-ELIGIBLE-003' AND updated_at!=created_at
di_meta.invariant_query: SELECT audit_id FROM audit_logs WHERE lead_id='LD-ELIGIBLE-003' AND updated_at!=created_at UNION ALL SELECT consent_id FROM consent_records WHERE lead_id='LD-ELIGIBLE-003' AND updated_at>created_at
di_meta.cleanup: DELETE FROM lead_identities WHERE lead_id='LD-ELIGIBLE-003'; DELETE FROM audit_logs WHERE lead_id='LD-ELIGIBLE-003'

test_name: DPO triggers dry-run from Retention Admin page and sees preview panel
preconditions: DPO-USER-001 authenticated in browser
retention_policies seeded with at least one active policy
At least 3 leads eligible for dry-run
test_steps: Assert DryRunPreviewPanel appears with eligible_leads, blocked_by_legal_hold, blocked_by_open_request counts
Assert no error Toast shown; data is not modified
expected_result: DryRunPreviewPanel renders with numeric counts; no data mutation; all counts are non-negative integers; no console errors; RM accessing same route receives 403

ui_meta.visual_assert: DryRunPreviewPanel is visible and contains numeric values; Apply button is absent or disabled for DPO role
ui_meta.a11y: Modal has role='dialog' with aria-labelledby; preview counts have descriptive aria-labels; TabIndex order is logical
